pr.title: Non-Record: BPB 1.13872 — LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Per-Layer LR Legal TTT (3 seeds)

output.summary: 11-layer depth-recurrence GPT uses LeakyReLU(0.5)² and per-layer/intra-chunk LR tweaks inside the legal score-first TTT recipe for improved pre-TTT modeling.
techniques: LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP activation across shared BlockCores
Per-layer LR multipliers plus intra-chunk cosine decay during legal score-first TTT
Score-first TTT with frozen early blocks and SGD momentum
